May 20, 2024
Road Traffic Collisions - New Amendments
May 20, 2024

I recently proposed two new amendments (35 and 36) to the Criminal Justice Bill. Amendment 35 seeks to require drivers who are involved in a collision to not flee the scene and to report the collision to the police. Amendment 36 reduces the amount of time from 24 to 2 hours that a driver has to report a collision.

Read More →
May 20, 2024
Mar 27, 2024
Petitions Committee - Calls for a Public Inquiry into the James Bulger case
Mar 27, 2024

I spoke this week in Parliament supporting the calls for a Public Inquiry into the James Bulger case, a petition for which was signed by over 5,000 of my Bootle constituents.

Read More →

Mar 26, 2024

Mar 26, 2024
